cells.rationale: Well-specified foundational leaf module with an enumerated floor/warn-once contract and a dictated shared return type; no design taste needed so GPT-first, but its contract-shaped ripple into every consumer warrants xhigh.

Cross-cutting multi-file cascade across daemon/autopilot/reconcile-core/cli with subtle correctness invariants (re-fold determinism, byte-identical golden argv) and fn-1240 merge adjacency — a nameable intelligence-bound reason for opus.
Bounded well-specified operator-surface extension (harvest refs, lint, list output) following fn-1241's landed pattern across a couple files in a known idiom.
Small, well-specified parse+validation extension mirrored across two island parsers in lockstep with a parity test — mechanical multi-file work in a known pattern, no design judgment.

Exacting byte-verbatim template conversion plus pin-injected render and golden re-capture; well-specified and template-following, routed to the GPT tier with the best complex-edit safety for the byte-stability constraint.
A bounded partition drift-gate test plus a multi-file rewrite of operator-facing install/composition/problem-code docs — the user-facing wording is a nameable sonnet reason over GPT-first.
